initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT foreign_data.name
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE cards.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
  AND cards.borderColor = 'black'
  AND foreign_data.type = 'Creature'
  AND foreign_data.language = 'French'
LIMIT 1;
